examples_base.question: Which NFL team represented the AFC at Super Bowl 50?
examples_base.pred: The Denver Broncos represented the AFC at Super Bowl 50.

examples_base.question: Which NFL team represented the NFC at Super Bowl 50?
examples_base.pred: The New Orleans Saints represented the NFC at Super Bowl 50.

examples_base.question: Where did Super Bowl 50 take place?
examples_base.pred: Super Bowl 50 took place at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta, Georgia.

examples_base.question: Which NFL team won Super Bowl 50?
examples_base.pred: The New England Patriots won Super Bowl 50 in 2016.

examples_base.question: What color was used to emphasize the 50th anniversary of the Super Bowl?
examples_base.pred: The color red was used to emphasize the 50th anniversary of the Super Bowl.
